title: triumfetta pilosa var. glabrescens
intro: Triumfetta pilosa var. glabrescens, also known as the hairy cottonweed or glabrous cottonweed, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and promoting immune function. Traditionally, Triumfetta pilosa var. glabrescens is prepared as a herbal decoction, tea, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
